title: santalum lanceolatum var. oblongatum
intro: Santalum lanceolatum var. oblongatum, also known as the oblong-fruited sandalwood, is a species of sandalwood that is native to Australia and is a variety of the Santalum lanceolatum plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Santalum lanceolatum var. oblongatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Santalum lanceolatum var. oblongatum can be prepared as an essential oil, powder, or tea, and is often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
